---
title: "Calculate distance between AutoDock Vina ligand distance and crystal structure"
author: "Mehnaz Meem"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_float: true
    code_folding: hide
    fig_width: 5
    fig_height: 5
theme: cosmo
---

Source: TBA

## Introduction

```{r,libs}

message("todo")

```

## Crystal structure position

```{r,crystal}

cx = 10.422
cy = -16.270
cz = 12.404

```

## Read data

```{r,read_autodock_data}

pdb <- readLines("docking8.pdbqt")
hetatm <- pdb[grep("HETATM",pdb)]
hetatm <- strsplit(hetatm," ")
hetatm[[1]][which(hetatm[[1]]!="")]
hetatm <- lapply(hetatm,function(x) { x[which(x!="")]  } )
hetatm_df <- do.call(rbind.data.frame, hetatm)
colnames(hetatm_df) <- paste("col",1:12)

```

Extract numerical coordinates (col6-8).
Data converted to numerical matrix

```{r,extract_coords}

mx <- apply(hetatm_df[,6:8],2,as.numeric)

str(mx)
summary(mx)

```

## Define ligand box

```{r,lig_box}

min_x <- min(mx[,1])
max_x <- max(mx[,1])
min_y <- min(mx[,2])
max_y <- max(mx[,2])
min_z <- min(mx[,3])
max_z <- max(mx[,3])

```

Prediction ligand position.

```{r,pred}

px <- ( min_x + max_x ) / 2
py <- ( min_y + max_y ) / 2
pz <- ( min_z + max_z ) / 2
```

## Calc diff

```{r,diff}

dx <- abs(cx - px)
dy <- abs(cy - py)
dz <- abs(cz - pz)

```

## 3d hypotenuse

```{r,hypot}

hyp <- sqrt(dx^2 + dy^2 + dz^2)

```

## Define a function

```{r,dist_function}

cxyz <- c(10.422,-16.270,12.404)

model_ligand_dist <- function(cxyz,pdbqt_file) {
pdb <- readLines(pdbqt_file)
hetatm <- pdb[grep("HETATM",pdb)]
hetatm <- strsplit(hetatm," ")
hetatm[[1]][which(hetatm[[1]]!="")]
hetatm <- lapply(hetatm,function(x) { x[which(x!="")]  } )
hetatm_df <- do.call(rbind.data.frame, hetatm)
colnames(hetatm_df) <- paste("col",1:12)
mx <- apply(hetatm_df[,6:8],2,as.numeric)
min_x <- min(mx[,1])
max_x <- max(mx[,1])
min_y <- min(mx[,2])
max_y <- max(mx[,2])
min_z <- min(mx[,3])
max_z <- max(mx[,3])
px <- ( min_x + max_x ) / 2
py <- ( min_y + max_y ) / 2
pz <- ( min_z + max_z ) / 2
cx = cxyz[1]
cy = cxyz[2]
cz = cxyz[3]
dx <- abs(cx - px)
dy <- abs(cy - py)
dz <- abs(cz - pz)
hyp <- sqrt(dx^2 + dy^2 + dz^2)
return(hyp)
}

```

Test the function.

```{r,functest}

model_ligand_dist(cxyz,"docking8.pdbqt")

```

Run for all pdbqt files

```{r,runall}

myfiles <- list.files(".",pattern="pdbqt")
myfiles <- myfiles[grep("docking",myfiles)]

distance <- unlist(lapply(myfiles, function(f) {
  model_ligand_dist(cxyz,f)
} ) )

names(distance) <- myfiles
barplot(distance)
distance

```

## Session info

For reproducibility.

```{r,session}

sessionInfo()

```
